ratified_by: Michael Bryan Hoch, Founder, Hoch Agent Swarm
authority: This is the ONLY file permitted to define the goal. Every other goal artifact in this repository is DERIVED from it and must declare that classification. A conflict between this file and any other file is resolved in favour of this file, always.
north_star: Build a governed autonomous factory that converts Michael Hoch's judgment into shipped, monetized products, while minimizing founder time and never representing unverified work as complete.

primary_optimization_objective.note: Founder time is the scarce resource. Every design decision is scored against this.

hard_constraint.statement: No fake green. No unevidenced completion. No autonomous execution beyond explicit authorization and policy.
hard_constraint.enforcement: Code, not prose. A constraint with no enforcement point is advisory and must be reported as such.
hard_constraint.corollary: Absence of evidence is never a pass. A requirement whose validator has not executed against current evidence contributes ZERO completion — never its last known value.

operational_interpretation.HAS: Performs research, design, development, testing, packaging, staging, and operational coordination.
operational_interpretation.HELM: Enforces runtime truth, evidence, authorization, cost, safety, and release integrity.
operational_interpretation.DOORSTEP: Delivers completed work to the founder ONLY when a legally, financially, or externally binding human action is required.
operational_interpretation.founder_is_not_transport: Michael must not remain the routine transport layer between agents, models, IDEs, or execution systems.

founder_only_actions: approval of new or exceptional spend
everything_else: Performed autonomously by HAS and presented at DOORSTEP with evidence.

1_canonical_north_star.statement: Governed autonomous delivery of monetized products with minimal founder intervention.

2_current_terminal_outcome.statement: Ship one monetizable factory product to production distribution and prove the full autonomous path from intake to DOORSTEP.
2_current_terminal_outcome.permanence: CURRENT — replaceable once achieved. This is a PROOF that the factory works, NOT the identity of the system.

3_current_champion_product.statement: Selected by the authoritative portfolio prioritization process.
3_current_champion_product.prohibition: No product (HSF Story Studio, Epic Fury, or any other) may be hardcoded as the permanent North Star. A champion is an OUTPUT, never the identity.
3_current_champion_product.completion_rule: COMPUTED_FROM_VALIDATORS. No initial percentage may be assigned from memory or a hardcoded value.

legacy_contract_reclassification.authority: NON_AUTHORITATIVE. Describes HOW, not WHAT. Retained.
NON_AUTHORITATIVE as a North Star. It is ONE measurable terminal outcome proving the factory works.
legacy_contract_reclassification.correction: Its goal_completion_percent: 95 is an ASSERTED LITERAL and is hereby void. Completion is computed by scripts/goal/goal_engine.py from executed validators only.

legacy_contract_reclassification.was: goal 'Launch HSF Story Studio as a paid product'
legacy_contract_reclassification.authority: NON_AUTHORITATIVE. STALE until reselected by the portfolio prioritization process. A candidate output, not the identity of the system.

legacy_contract_reclassification.was: de facto goal of recent work
legacy_contract_reclassification.authority: NON_AUTHORITATIVE as a goal. It is the instrument that makes claims about the goal trustworthy.

retention_policy: Do not delete historical contracts until their provenance is archived. All four are retained and reclassified, never removed.

completion_rules.rule: completion = weight-sum of requirements whose validator EXECUTED SUCCESSFULLY against CURRENT evidence, divided by the weight-sum of all blocking requirements for that layer.
prohibitions: NO fallback completion percentage may ever be emitted. A missing source yields null + UNKNOWN, never a number.
NO requirement may be marked complete by editing a status string.
Founder-only gates are reported SEPARATELY and must NOT reduce autonomous implementation progress.
Product / platform / governance / North-Star progress remain DISTINCT metrics and may never be averaged into one number.

critical_path_rules.prohibition: Never from hardcoded status strings (audit finding F-01.2).
critical_path_rules.next_task_rule: The next recommended task is the highest-impact unresolved node on the canonical goal's current critical path.

governance_posture: FAIL-CLOSED. Preserved unchanged by this reconciliation.
